---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

<!--
# CONSOLIDATOR (STAGE-2) for Fig 3n + ED Fig 5b — multi-condition
# comparison of PA-Rac1 activation effects across 5 conditions
# (WT GC, WT Soma, Arp3 KO, PA-Rac1-C450M, PA-Rac1-T17N).

## What this file does

This is the **STAGE-2 CONSOLIDATOR**. It loads its own WT (GC + soma)
data from ``WT_length.RData``, then ``readRDS()``s three sibling
precursor outputs (lines 221-229):

| .rds loaded | Produced by (STAGE-1 precursor) |
|---|---|
| ``KO_actin_int.rds``, ``KO_length.rds`` | ``figures/Fig03_Arp3/edfig05b_fig03n_parac1_arp3ko_pre_act_post_precursor.Rmd`` |
| ``T17N_actin_int.rds``, ``T17N_length.rds`` | ``figures/Fig03_Arp3/edfig05b_fig03n_parac1_t17n_pre_act_post_precursor.Rmd`` |
| ``C450M_actin_int.rds``, ``C450M_length.rds`` | ``figures/Fig03_Arp3/edfig05b_fig03n_parac1_c450m_pre_act_post_precursor.Rmd`` |

Then ``rbind()``s 5 condition dataframes (WT_GC, WT_Soma, KO,
C450M, T17N) for both length and actin intensity (lines 231-234), and
plots the multi-pairwise comparison across conditions (lines 275, 327).

Outputs:
- ``Actin_intensity.pdf`` (line 289) — multi-condition actin intensity
  difference (Pre vs Act) → **ED Fig 5b**.
- ``Length.pdf`` (line 341) — multi-condition length difference → **Fig 3n**.
- ``PARac1WT_soma_actinInt.eps`` (lines 380, 387 — duplicate save)
  — PA-Rac1 WT soma-only Pre vs Act actin intensity within-cell
  comparison. UNCERTAIN — possibly a Fig 3m supporting plot or a
  diagnostic version.

## Manuscript panels

- **Fig 3n** (line 117 of ``Arp3_manuscript 20260501.docx``): "Length
  difference induced by the activation of PA-Rac1 and the variants.
  For PA-Rac1 in WT neurons, N = 31 activation events at the growth
  cone and 22 activation events at the soma from 4 experiments; for
  PA-Rac1T17N in WT neurons, N = 20 activation events; for
  PA-Rac1C450M in WT neurons, N = 57 activation events; for PA-Rac1
  in Arp3 KO neurons, N = 40 activation events from 3 experiments.
  *p < 0.05; ns by **Kruskal-Wallis test followed by Dunn's post-hoc
  test with Bonferroni correction**."
- **ED Fig 5b** (line 347): "Actin intensity difference induced by the
  activation of PA-Rac1 and the variants. ... Two-tailed
  **Kruskal-Wallis test followed by Dunn's post-hoc with Bonferroni**."

## Algorithm

The body uses **Welch t-test** in pairwise comparisons. The manuscript
reports **Kruskal-Wallis + Dunn's post-hoc**. The published p-values
were recomputed in GraphPad Prism. This file's role is to produce the
per-event normalized Pre/Act/Post difference values that feed Source
Data; the inline t-test is informal.

## Per-condition N counts (body vs published)

| Condition | Body N (approx) | Published Fig 3n N | Published ED Fig 5b N |
|---|---|---|---|
| PA-Rac1 WT GC | 32 + 13 (LSM980 rbind) - 3 removed ≈ 42 | 31 | 27 |
| PA-Rac1 WT Soma | 22 | 22 | 21 |
| PA-Rac1 in Arp3 KO | 45 (KO_length.rds) | 40 | 40 |
| PA-Rac1 C450M | 58 (C450M_length.rds) | 57 | 21 |
| PA-Rac1 T17N | 20 (T17N_length.rds) | 20 | 18 |

Body Ns ≥ published Ns; outlier filtering on lines 249, 301
(``Diff < 350 & > -150`` and ``Diff < 30 & > -25``) trims the published
Ns. C450M N=57 (Fig 3n) vs N=21 (ED Fig 5b) — different metrics likely
use different filtering thresholds.

## Original G:\ source

G:/Figure 3_Arp3/Fig. 3j-n_PARac1/Andor/R_scripts/Neurite_length/Neurite_length.Rmd
-->

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(pracma)
library(peakPick)
library(quantmod)
library(ggpmisc)
library(tidyverse)
library(magrittr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggfortify)
library(forecast)
library(tsibble)
library(broom)
library(tidyquant)
library(tsbox)
library("pheatmap")
library("RColorBrewer")
library(ggpmisc)
library(ggfortify)
library(viridis) # Default Color Maps from 'matplotlib' 
library(hrbrthemes)
library(data.table)
library(superheat)
library(ggpubr)
```

## load existing/saved environment (.RData)
```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "WT_length.RData",  sep = "/")
load(file=saved_path)
```

# Neurite length and actin intensity change by GC activation
```{r}
GC_length<- rbind(GC_neurite_length, GC_neurite_length_2)

GC_length$Series<- c("Pre", "Act", "Post")

GC_length$roi <- rep(1:32, each=3)

GC_length$Length <- GC_length$Length*0.222222
```

```{r}
GC_neurite_length_LSM980$Series<- c("Pre", "Act", "Post")

GC_neurite_length_LSM980$roi <- rep(1:13, each=3)

GC_length<- rbind(GC_length, GC_neurite_length_LSM980)
```

```{r}
GC_length_2<- GC_length[-c(73:75), ]
GC_length_2$Image <- GC_length_2$Label %>% str_remove("\\.tif:.*")
GC_length_2$Site <- "GC"
GC_length_2$exp <- "WT_PA_Rac1_WT"
```

# Length
```{r}
GC_length_wide<- pivot_wider(GC_length_2, id_cols = c("roi", "Image", "Site", "exp"), names_from = "Series", values_from = "Length") # Value_from = Length for neurite length or Mean for actin int
GC_length_wide$Diff<- GC_length_wide$Act - GC_length_wide$Pre
GC_length_wide$mean<- rowMeans(GC_length_wide[,c("Pre", "Act", "Post")])

GC_length_wide$Pre <- GC_length_wide$Pre - GC_length_wide$mean
GC_length_wide$Act <- GC_length_wide$Act - GC_length_wide$mean
GC_length_wide$Post <- GC_length_wide$Post - GC_length_wide$mean

#saveRDS(GC_length_wide, file="Control_GC_neuriteLength.rds")

GC_length_long<- pivot_longer(GC_length_wide, cols=c("Pre", "Act", "Post"), names_to = "Series", values_to="Length")

GC_length_long$Series <- factor(GC_length_long$Series, levels=unique(GC_length_long$Series))
```

# Actin intensity
```{r}
GC_Int_wide<- pivot_wider(GC_length_2, id_cols = c("roi", "Image", "Site", "exp"), names_from = "Series", values_from = "Mean") # Value_from = Length for neurite length or Mean for actin int
GC_Int_wide$Diff<- GC_Int_wide$Act - GC_Int_wide$Pre
GC_Int_wide$mean<- rowMeans(GC_Int_wide[,c("Pre", "Act", "Post")])

GC_Int_wide$Pre <- GC_Int_wide$Pre - GC_Int_wide$mean
GC_Int_wide$Act <- GC_Int_wide$Act - GC_Int_wide$mean
GC_Int_wide$Post <- GC_Int_wide$Post - GC_Int_wide$mean

#saveRDS(GC_Int_wide, file="Control_GC_neuriteLength.rds")

GC_Int_long<- pivot_longer(GC_Int_wide, cols=c("Pre", "Act", "Post"), names_to = "Series", values_to="Actin_int")

GC_Int_long$Series <- factor(GC_Int_long$Series, levels=unique(GC_Int_long$Series))
```

# new analysis (GC?)

# Length (the measurment does not make sense; don't use)

# Actin intensity

# Neurite length and actin intensity change by soma activation
```{r}
soma_length <- soma_length
soma_length$Series<- c("Pre", "Act", "Post")
soma_length$roi <- rep(1:22, each=3)
soma_length$Length <- soma_length$Length*0.222222

soma_length$Image <- soma_length$Label %>% str_remove("\\.tif:.*")
soma_length$Site <- "Soma"
soma_length$exp <- "WT_PA_Rac1_WT"
```

# Length
```{r}
soma_length_wide<- pivot_wider(soma_length, id_cols = c("roi", "Image", "Site", "exp"), names_from = "Series", values_from = "Length") # Value_from = Length for neurite length or Mean for actin int
soma_length_wide$Diff<- soma_length_wide$Act - soma_length_wide$Pre
soma_length_wide$mean<- rowMeans(soma_length_wide[,c("Pre", "Act", "Post")])

soma_length_wide$Pre <- soma_length_wide$Pre - soma_length_wide$mean
soma_length_wide$Act <- soma_length_wide$Act - soma_length_wide$mean
soma_length_wide$Post <- soma_length_wide$Post - soma_length_wide$mean

#saveRDS(soma_length_wide, file="Control_soma_neuriteLength.rds")

soma_length_long<- pivot_longer(soma_length_wide, cols=c("Pre", "Act", "Post"), names_to = "Series", values_to="Length")

soma_length_long$Series <- factor(soma_length_long$Series, levels=unique(soma_length_long$Series))

```

# Actin intensity
```{r}
soma_Int_wide<- pivot_wider(soma_length, id_cols = c("roi", "Image", "Site", "exp"), names_from = "Series", values_from = "Mean") # Value_from = Length for neurite length or Mean for actin int
soma_Int_wide$Diff<- soma_Int_wide$Act - soma_Int_wide$Pre
soma_Int_wide$mean<- rowMeans(soma_Int_wide[,c("Pre", "Act", "Post")])

soma_Int_wide$Pre <- soma_Int_wide$Pre - soma_Int_wide$mean
soma_Int_wide$Act <- soma_Int_wide$Act - soma_Int_wide$mean
soma_Int_wide$Post <- soma_Int_wide$Post - soma_Int_wide$mean

#saveRDS(soma_Int_wide, file="Control_soma_neuriteLength.rds")

soma_Int_long<- pivot_longer(soma_Int_wide, cols=c("Pre", "Act", "Post"), names_to = "Series", values_to="Actin_int")

soma_Int_long$Series <- factor(soma_Int_long$Series, levels=unique(soma_Int_long$Series))

```

```{r}
KO_actin_int_df <- readRDS("KO_actin_int.rds")
colnames(KO_actin_int_df)[8] <- "Actin_int"

C450M_actin_int_df <- readRDS("C450M_actin_int.rds")
T17N_actin_int_df <- readRDS("T17N_actin_int.rds")

KO_length_df <- readRDS("KO_length.rds")
C450M_length_df <- readRDS("C450M_length.rds")
T17N_length_df <- readRDS("T17N_length.rds")

actin_int_df <- rbind (GC_Int_long, soma_Int_long, KO_actin_int_df, C450M_actin_int_df, T17N_actin_int_df)  %>% as.data.table()
actin_int_df$group <- paste(actin_int_df$exp , actin_int_df$Site, sep="_")

length_df <- rbind (GC_length_long, soma_length_long, KO_length_df, C450M_length_df, T17N_length_df) %>% as.data.table()
length_df$group <- paste (length_df$exp, length_df$Site, sep = "_" )

actin_int_df$ID <- paste(actin_int_df$Image, actin_int_df$group)
length_df$ID <- paste(length_df$Image, length_df$group)

```

```{r}

actin_int_df_2<- actin_int_df[Series == "Act"]

# outliers <- actin_int_df_2 %>% group_by(group) %>% rstatix::identify_outliers(mean) 
# actin_int_df_2 <- actin_int_df_2[! (ID %in% outliers$ID)]

actin_int_df_2 <- actin_int_df_2 [Diff <350 & Diff > -150]

actin_int_df_2$group %>% table()
```

```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
 my_comparisons <- list(c("WT_PA_Rac1_WT_GC", "WT_PA_Rac1_WT_Soma"), c("KO_PA_Rac1_WT_NA", "WT_PA_Rac1_C450M_GC"), c("KO_PA_Rac1_WT_NA", "WT_PA_Rac1_WT_GC"), c("WT_PA_Rac1_C450M_GC", "WT_PA_Rac1_WT_GC"), c("KO_PA_Rac1_WT_NA", "WT_PA_Rac1_WT_Soma"), c("WT_PA_Rac1_C450M_GC", "WT_PA_Rac1_WT_Soma"), c("KO_PA_Rac1_WT_NA", "WT_PA_Rac1_T17N_GC"), c("WT_PA_Rac1_C450M_GC", "WT_PA_Rac1_T17N_GC"))
pj <- position_jitter(seed = 1, width = .05, height = 0)

actin_int_df_2  %>% 
  
ggplot ( aes(x=group, y=Diff, fill=group) )+ 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + 
  theme_classic()+
geom_violin(aes(), trim=F,  kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1)  +
 geom_boxplot(aes(), width=0.2, outlier.colour = NA, fill="white")+ 

#geom_jitter(aes(), shape=16, position=position_jitter(0.1))+ #aes(color = batch)
   geom_point(aes(fill=group), position = pj)+ 
  
# geom_line(aes(group=cell), position = pj, alpha = 0.2) +
# geom_path(aes(group = cell),alpha = 0.2)+
    
 scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), 
                    limits = c(-300, 700), 
                    breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 8))+ 
stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, paired=F, method="t.test") +

  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold", angle = 0)) #for centering the text 
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "Actin_intensity.pdf",
   width=14, height=7, 
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")
```

```{r}
length_df_2<- length_df[Series == "Act"]

# outliers <- actin_int_df_2 %>% group_by(group) %>% rstatix::identify_outliers(mean) 
# actin_int_df_2 <- actin_int_df_2[! (ID %in% outliers$ID)]

length_df_2 <- length_df_2 [Diff <30 & Diff > -25]

length_df_2$group %>% table()
```

```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
 my_comparisons <- list(c("WT_PA_Rac1_WT_GC", "WT_PA_Rac1_WT_Soma"), c("KO_PA_Rac1_WT_NA", "WT_PA_Rac1_C450M_GC"), c("KO_PA_Rac1_WT_NA", "WT_PA_Rac1_WT_GC"), c("WT_PA_Rac1_C450M_GC", "WT_PA_Rac1_WT_GC"), c("KO_PA_Rac1_WT_NA", "WT_PA_Rac1_WT_Soma"), c("WT_PA_Rac1_C450M_GC", "WT_PA_Rac1_WT_Soma"), c("KO_PA_Rac1_WT_NA", "WT_PA_Rac1_T17N_GC"), c("WT_PA_Rac1_C450M_GC", "WT_PA_Rac1_T17N_GC"))
pj <- position_jitter(seed = 1, width = .05, height = 0)

length_df_2  %>% 
  
ggplot ( aes(x=group, y=Diff, fill=group) )+ 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + 
  theme_classic()+
geom_violin(aes(), trim=F,  kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1)  +
 geom_boxplot(aes(), width=0.2, outlier.colour = NA, fill="white")+ 

#geom_jitter(aes(), shape=16, position=position_jitter(0.1))+ #aes(color = batch)
   geom_point(aes(fill=group), position = pj)+ 
  
# geom_line(aes(group=cell), position = pj, alpha = 0.2) +
# geom_path(aes(group = cell),alpha = 0.2)+
    
 scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), 
                   limits = c(-30, 60), 
                    breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 8))+ 
stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, paired=F, method="t.test") +

  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold", angle = 45)) #for centering the text 
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "Length.pdf",
   width=14, height=7, 
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=8}
library(ggpubr)

# my_comparisons <- list( c("Pre", "Act"), c("Pre", "Post"), c("Act", "Post") )

my_comparisons <- list( c("Pre", "Act") )

soma_Int_long %>% subset(soma_length_long$Series != "Post") %>% 
  
ggplot(aes(x=Series, y=Actin_int, fill=Series)) + 
  geom_violin(trim=FALSE, 
              kernel ="gaussian", 
              adjust=1)+
  #geom_boxplot(width=2, fill="white")  +
  geom_point(aes(fill=Series,group=roi), position = position_dodge(0.2))+
  geom_line(aes(group=roi), position = position_dodge(0.2)) +
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, paired=T, method="wilcox.test")+
  scale_y_continuous( expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-300, 600), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 7))+
  
  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
  
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text 

# plotly::ggplotly(p)
```
```{r}
ggsave(
  "PARac1WT_soma_actinInt.eps",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "eps")
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "PARac1WT_soma_actinInt.eps",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "eps")
```

```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "WT_length.RData",  sep = "/")
save.image(file=saved_path)

```
